title: Cap Timm Field
body: Cap Timm Field is a baseball field located in Ames, Iowa and has been the home of the Iowa State Cyclones baseball program for four decades, a span that includes its time as both a varsity intercollegiate sport and a club sport.  The ballpark is named after former Cyclones baseball coach Cap Timm.
